title: Pink Ancient Debris
description: A soft pink retexture of Ancient Debris that keeps the vanilla feel while adding a clean, pastel Netherite vibe.
body:
Pink Ancient Debris is a simple texture pack that replaces the standard Ancient Debris with a pink version while preserving the original Minecraft style and shading. It keeps the block instantly recognizable for survival gameplay, but adds a softer, more aesthetic look.

![TheDebris02](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eaab503a220cbb79b684572504a040e0a7998890.png)
